name: bluearf-nova
description: Use the Bluearf Nova Public API from Codex through the official Python SDK and CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Query Nova data, credits, usage, vehicles, models, and carbon calculations.
interface.longDescription: Bluearf Nova gives Codex a safe customer-facing workflow for the Bluearf Nova Public API. It uses the official Python SDK and CLI for credits, usage, companies, vehicle data, vehicle model references, carbon records, CarbonDataUniform, and passenger/commercial vehicle carbon calculations.
defaultPrompt: Show my Bluearf Nova API credits
List my Nova vehicles for a company
